title: Mechanical sensor for the two friction blind spots
learning: reflect-2026-06-24: friction-radar anchors on loud signals and misses the quietly-overloaded (Iqra) and the incident-causers (Haroon) — reinforced by the self-healer lesson that a prompt/guide without a mechanical sensor doesn't enforce.
summary: Added friction_signals.py — pure functions that compute the two blind spots from raw Slack messages instead of asking the LLM to infer them from a transcript: inbound_load/quietly_overloaded (counts mentions AIMED AT a user vs their outbound voice, so the silently-drowning surface) and incident_signals (regex over what BROKE — overwrite/revert/prod-down/data-loss — so the incident-causer surfaces even when nobody says 'blocked'). blind_spot_block() renders these as a prompt-injectable facts block the friction coach prepends so the analyzer cannot overlook them.
